mapper.select: INSERT INTO dc3_entity_state (id, entity_type_flag, entity_id, parent_entity_id, entity_state_flag, last_state_flag, lease_version, expire_time, timeout_seconds, last_heartbeat_time, last_alarm_id, timeout_source_flag, entity_state_ext, tenant_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{entityTypeFlag}, #{entityId}, #{parentEntityId}, #{stateFlag}, #{initialLastStateFlag}, 1, #{expireTime}, #{timeoutSeconds}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0, #{timeoutSourceFlag}, json_build_object('type', #{stateExtType}, 'content', COALESCE(#{stateDescription}, ''), 'version', 1), #{tenantId}) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, entity_type_flag, entity_id) DO UPDATE SET parent_entity_id = EXCLUDED.parent_entity_id, entity_state_flag = EXCLUDED.entity_state_flag, last_state_flag = dc3_entity_state.entity_state_flag, lease_version = dc3_entity_state.lease_version + 1, expire_time = EXCLUDED.expire_time, timeout_seconds = EXCLUDED.timeout_seconds, last_heartbeat_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, timeout_source_flag = EXCLUDED.timeout_source_flag, entity_state_ext = CASE WHEN COALESCE(#{stateDescription}, '') != '' THEN json_build_object( 'type', dc3_entity_state.entity_state_ext->>'type', 'content', #{stateDescription}, 'version', COALESCE((dc3_entity_state.entity_state_ext->>'version')::int, 0) + 1 ) ELSE dc3_entity_state.entity_state_ext END, operate_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP RETURNING id, entity_type_flag, entity_id, parent_entity_id, entity_state_flag, last_state_flag, lease_version, expire_time, timeout_seconds, last_heartbeat_time, last_alarm_id, timeout_source_flag, entity_state_ext, tenant_id, create_time, operate_time

WITH picked AS (SELECT id, entity_state_flag AS previous_state_flag, lease_version AS previous_lease_version FROM dc3_entity_state WHERE entity_type_flag = #{entityTypeFlag} AND entity_state_flag IN (#{onlineFlag}, #{maintainFlag}, #{faultFlag}) AND expire_time <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY expire_time ASC LIMIT #{batchSize} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED) UPDATE dc3_entity_state s SET lease_version = picked.previous_lease_version + 1, entity_state_flag = #{offlineFlag}, last_state_flag = picked.previous_state_flag, expire_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + (#{offlineRenewSeconds} * INTERVAL '1 second'), operate_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM picked WHERE s.id = picked.id RETURNING s.id , s.entity_type_flag , s.entity_id , s.parent_entity_id , s.entity_state_flag , s.last_state_flag , s.lease_version , s.expire_time , s.timeout_seconds , s.last_heartbeat_time , s.last_alarm_id , s.timeout_source_flag , s.entity_state_ext , s.tenant_id , s.create_time , s.operate_time
